Too often advertising agencies focus on selling products regardless of benefit. Modern digital marketing and brand management is far too complicated for a “one size fits all” approach. Nuances and subtle differences separate you from your competition and a custom strategy tailored to your business is essential for long term success. OUR MISSION Whether you’re new to brand management or a seasoned business owner looking to partner with an agency, our mission is to meet you where you’re at and grow with you. As a creative agency and brand management firm, we are more than just a marketing company. We have the resources and experience to match your pace and budget as we take on the digital marketing landscape together. OUR HISTORY Founded in 2011 by industry veterans, Brandefined has been, and proudly remains, a work in progress. During the rise of high-speed internet in the early 2000’s, our Founders were helping businesses adapt by establishing their online presence. In those early years of digital marketing, a comprehensive online strategy simply involved a quality website and first page visibility on the search engines. By comparison to the current technological landscape, those times were simple. If Brandefined was to continue providing effective solutions to our clients, we had to adapt. The decade that followed saw mobile devices largely replace personal computers and the unprecedented rise of social media. By necessity, once effective online strategies had to be completely reimagined. And, with each advancement, our team responded by developing new products and solutions to help local businesses thrive. Ranging from responsive web development to comprehensive social media management, we have built the infrastructure to adapt to the changing digital landscape. I'm a bot, delete this. About Us Who we are Home > About Us Our Values Honesty We believe it’s better to be honest than to delude others, because then you are probably deluding yourself, too. We believe in doing the right thing and to not cut corners to drive profits. Respect Apollo Marketing is a proud Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business. We strongly encourage mutual respect to reduce workplace stress and to build strong workplace relationships among both colleagues and clients. Transparency We believe in business transparency so all of our clients know where we are in the work performed, and we make it easy for our clients to monitor results from our efforts. Community Our sense of community stems from a coaching, volunteering, and a giving back philosophy. We take pride in where we live and believe that when we cooperatively face challenges together, we can make a local impact. Our Philosophy But first, a little background into the owners purpose… To start, my beautiful wife loves the sun! Like really really really loves it! Her happy place is sitting in a chair on a beach at the edge of the water line with her toes in the water and the sun warming her soul. My kids are part Greek, and my son has always been a Greek God aficionado. He may not openly admit it, but even as an adult he’s still a Percy Jackson fan. I get it though as I too enjoy the series! On my side of the family, I was around 16 when my Mom started her own business. Looking back, I can still remember how proud she was when the doors opened. Nine years later, I also remember the sad day when she closed the doors, and thinking I wish I could have helped. Back to our philosophy… As a seasoned service industry program manager, I wanted to start a service business that centered around helping other businesses grow via marketing and sales. Our name and philosophy came about when I looked at my purpose, my family, and it hit me like a bowling ball. The two Greek Gods, Apollo and Helios are often identified as the same being – or Apollo. Among other things Apollo was worshiped as the sun-god, and it was believed that he and his horse driven chariot guided the sun across the sky each day. For our business, the name Apollo epitomizes both family and guidance. Apollo Marketing’s philosophy is to bring family and community to business, and whose goals are to help guide businesses towards accomplishing their marketing objectives. By doing this, we build strong partnerships to help your small to medium sized business flourish and succeed. pages.about: About Us | Alexandria VA Web Design and Internet Marketing Agency (571) 604-5474 info@herbstmarketing.com HOME CONTACT About Services Websites Google Business Profile Optimization Search Engine Optimization (SEO) Reputation Management Marketing Automation and Sales Funnels Social Media Marketing Printing Services FUN CALCULATORS Double Revenue With Herbst Marketing Calculator Calculate Customer Value: Herbst Marketing Guide Blog Select Page About Us Herbst Marketing helps small business owners leverage the internet to: generate more leads, attract and keep more customers, make more sales and increase profits. In today’s world, doing business without a website is like doing business without a telephone. To be effective, small business websites need to be designed and structured in a specific way to “get the click and get the sale.” While there are plenty of free do-it-yourself website options available to small business owners today, few small business owners have the know-how or the time to design and set up a website that works — a website that will actually help you grow your business and save you money, time and energy on marketing and advertising. The Herbst Marketing team of web design and internet marketing specialists can create the web presence you need to compete effectively in today’s economy. Our expertise encompasses: Small Business Website Design and Development Local Search Optimization: Google Places and Local Directory Listings Social Media Services: Facebook, Linked-In, Twitter Profile Set-Up Blog Content Development and Management Web Copywriting Reputation Management and Online Reviews Management If you need professional help creating and managing a web presence that will grow your business and revenue Call Herbst Marketing 540-937-7234 to schedule your web marketing consultation. Herbst Marketing Services is owned by Yvonne Herbst, who along with her small team of dedicated website development professionals, provides small business website design, web copywriting services, web video production, social media management (i.e. facebook, twitter, google+, etc.) and internet marketing services (i.e. website optimization and promotion) to local business owners. Call Yvonne directly for advice: (540) 937-7234. Our Story In 2014, Jennifer Holm decided that excellent marketing should be accessible to everyone, not just companies with massive marketing budgets. She founded BoBella to make this idea a reality. BoBella is a woman-owned boutique marketing company based in Bethesda, Maryland. We take pride in our entrepreneurial spirit and dedication to fostering long-term partnerships. Our experienced team specializes in brand strategy, digital marketing, web design, and outreach promotions. Our focus is on delivering innovative solutions that drive growth and boost sales. With a commitment to seamless project delivery, we give you the freedom to focus on running your business while we handle all of your marketing needs. Why BoBella? Our name is inspired by beauty and balance. “Bo” stems from beau , the masculine word for beautiful in French, while “Bella” is the feminine word for beautiful in Italian. Together, they form BoBella, symbolizing our dedication to creating beautiful and impactful brands. Today, the BoBella team proudly serves businesses all over the world. Whether we’re working with local small businesses on their digital marketing strategy or government organizations on community outreach, we strive to constantly cultivate fresh ideas and bring unique solutions to challenging problems. We partner with organizations of all sizes nationwide and tailor creative strategies that compliment your existing marketing efforts. We believe that top-notch marketing should be affordable for all businesses. We are different from other agencies because everything we do is built around generating leads long-term. We believe that you should own your marketing systems and the leads it generates. We will build those systems for you, ensuring that you have ownership of all the data. The team at BoBella knows how to create design that is built with digital analytics in mind. This leads to marketing that is trackable, you can see exactly how we are preforming from our detailed monthly reports. How much does a website cost? Our website design process is 100% customized to meet your budget and goals. Our custom built website strategy packages starts as low as $5,000.  We have clients who are even on a 12-month engagement to help stay on budget. To start working with us, it is best to set up a call. We can have a conversation about the functionalities you will need and the complexity of your organization. We usually build on WordPress, so the back-end of the website is easy to use for non-technical people.  Our goal is to build a rock-solid website that generates you leads for lasting, long-term success. How much does Digital Marketing Cost? Our digital marketing services start at $575 a month with a 3-month minimum commitment. Depending on what your needs are (PPC Ads, SEO, Social Media, Lead Generation, etc.) we can strategize the components of your project and build out a monthly ongoing plan. Our goal is to bring you conversions. We will work together to determine what those conversions will be, ie: sales, leads, views, likes, etc., and ensure that we meet our set KPIs each month. What's included in your monthly reports? We customize our digital marketing reports to focus on the analytics that are important to you and your business. There are no cookie-cutter solutions for our clients. We customize every program and report to your specific needs. We recommend scheduling monthly chats to review the your marketing reports. On these video call will will go over all of the key details of your account, review what’s working, and ensure that we are in agreement for our goals are each month. This allows us to pivot as needed on a month-to-month basis allowing your business to adapt quickly to changes in your industry. How long will it take to start seeing results? Any digital marketing strategy is going to take time to get results. That is why we recommend a minimum commitment of 3 months for any of our digital marketing packages. After 3 months, you should start seeing a return on your investment, and after 6-9 months there should be upward traffic and more leads that will attribute to growth. The Digital Agency You've Been Looking For. Samantha Digital LLC is a leading digital marketing agency based in Fairfax, Virginia, serving clients worldwide. We help ambitious entrepreneurs get more website traffic, leads, & sales from their websites through strategic branding, web design, and search engine optimization. About Samantha Digital We specialize in branding, web design, and SEO for ambitious business owners that want to get more traffic from Google and more leads from their website. We pride ourselves on quality and integrity, so you can rest assured when you choose us as your digital marketing team, we will deliver. We are excited about the possibility of working with you, so get in touch with us today and we will get back to you to discuss how we can help grow your business. Our Core Beliefs No Business is Too Small for a Website Every business, regardless of its size, deserves a powerful online presence. We believe that even the smallest ventures with big ambitions can benefit immensely from a strategic website that acts as a cornerstone for growth and visibility. SEO is the #1 Form of Marketing, Even in 2025 *Especially* in 2025. In a digital world where competition is fierce, SEO remains the most effective marketing strategy. We prioritize search engine optimization because it provides sustainable, long-term traffic and growth, proving its value time and again. Your Website Should Work as Hard as You Do Your website shouldn't be just a digital business card. It should be a 24/7 marketing machine, constantly driving leads, sales, engagement, and building your brand. We ensure that your website is a dynamic asset, working around the clock to grow your business. We Believe in the Long Game True success isn't achieved through shortcuts or overnight tactics. We champion a long-term approach, focusing on strategies that build enduring value and robust growth for your business over time, rather than quick fixes. Samantha Digital History Wondering how we got started? It’s probably not what you think… 2019 Landed My ‘Dream’ Job In early 2019 I landed what I thought was my ‘dream’ job in consulting. I worked hard, stayed late, and kept learning. I loved solving clients’ complex problems and leading my team by example. However, after about a year, my passion for technology consulting fizzled out. 2019 2020 Turning Point I started a food blog, Lifestyled By Sam , as a creative outlet to share my passion for baking and hosting parties while leveraging my technical knowledge and experience. 2020 2021 Learning & Loving Blogging By the fall of 2021, I was starting to really feel like I was getting the hang of this whole blogging thing. I was noticing an uptick in traffic, and I was creating systems to be more effective. I continued to spend practically every minute outside of work on my food blog. Some of my most popular posts include: coffee gift basket , DIY mimosa bar , DIY edible arrangement , rainbow cupcake cake , Italian-themed date night , skeleton charcuterie board , and my margarita bar cart . 2021 2022 Founded Samantha Digital In 2022, I realized that while I loved blogging about desserts and hosting parties, my real passion was blogging, SEO, and website development.
